en:
A young woman walks into a small shop.
A shop assistant comes to her and asks if she wants any help.
The woman wants a new dress for a party.
She likes the blue material, but she does not want any red ones.
"What size do you want, madam?" the assistant asks.
"I want a small size," she says.
The assistant shows her a pretty dress in a nice colour.
The woman is very happy and buys it.
cn:
一位年轻女子走进一家小店。
一名售货员走到她跟前，问她是否需要帮忙。
这位女子想买一条参加聚会穿的新连衣裙。
她喜欢蓝色的布料，但她不想要红色的。
“夫人，您要多大尺码？”售货员问道。
“我要小号的，”她说。
售货员给她拿了一条颜色很好看的漂亮连衣裙。
这位女子非常满意，买下了它。

en:
Mr. Green goes to the food shop on Saturday.
He wants a loaf of bread and a tin of fish.
He also wants a pound of flour and some cheese.
"Do you want any milk?" the shopkeeper asks.
"Yes, I want two bottles of milk," Mr. Green says.
"Is that all?" the shopkeeper asks with a smile.
"Yes, that is all. Thank you very much," he answers.
cn:
星期六，格林先生去食品店。
他想买一条面包和一罐鱼罐头。
他还想买一磅面粉和一些奶酪。
“您要牛奶吗？”店主问道。
“要，我要两瓶牛奶，”格林先生说。
“就这些吗？”店主笑着问。
“对，就这些。非常感谢，”他回答说。

en:
The telephone is ringing and Mrs. Brown answers it.
A friend wants to talk to her son, Tom.
"I'm sorry, but Tom can't come now," she says.
"What's the matter with him?" the friend asks.
"He has a bad cold and a high temperature."
Tom is staying in bed and he is resting now.
"He must stay in bed today," Mrs. Brown says.
"He mustn't get up at all."
cn:
电话铃响了，布朗太太去接。
一位朋友想找她的儿子汤姆说话。
“很抱歉，汤姆现在来不了，”她说。
“他怎么了？”朋友问道。
“他得了重感冒，还发着高烧。”
汤姆正卧床休息。
“他今天必须待在床上，”布朗太太说。
“他绝对不许起床。”

en:
The doctor comes to see Tom again in the morning.
"How is he today?" the doctor asks.
"He is much better than yesterday," Mrs. Brown says.
Tom is sitting up in bed and he is smiling now.
He is still a little tired, but he is not ill.
The doctor gives him some medicine and says, "He will be well soon."
"Thank you, doctor," Mrs. Brown says at the door.
cn:
早上，医生又来看汤姆。
“他今天怎么样？”医生问。
“他比昨天好多了，”布朗太太说。
汤姆正坐在床上，脸上带着笑。
他还有点累，但已经不生病了。
医生给他开了一些药，说：“他很快就会好起来。”
“谢谢您，医生，”布朗太太在门口说道。

en:
It is ten o'clock and little Jack is still awake.
"It is very late now. You must go to bed," his mother says.
"Can I stay up a little longer, Mum?" Jack asks.
"No, you can't. You must listen to me."
"But I am not a baby now," Jack says.
"I am a big boy and I can go to bed by myself."
His mother smiles and says, "You are a grown-up, but you must sleep now."
cn:
已经十点了，小杰克还醒着。
“现在很晚了。你必须去睡觉了，”他妈妈说。
“妈妈，我可以再晚睡一会儿吗？”杰克问道。
“不行。你必须听我的。”
“可我现在不是小孩子了，”杰克说。
“我是个大孩子了，我能自己上床睡觉。”
他妈妈笑着说：“你是个大人了，但你现在必须睡觉。”

en:
"What are you doing this weekend?" Anna asks her friend Kate.
"I am very busy," Kate says.
"We are expecting some guests on Saturday."
Kate is preparing a big meal for them now.
Her husband is cleaning the house and buying some drinks.
"The guests are staying with us for two days," Kate says.
"It will be a happy weekend for all of us."
cn:
“这个周末你打算做什么？”安娜问她的朋友凯特。
“我很忙，”凯特说。
“星期六我们家要来几位客人。”
凯特现在正为他们准备一顿丰盛的饭。
她丈夫正在打扫房子、买些饮料。
“客人要在我们家住两天，”凯特说。
“对我们大家来说，这会是个愉快的周末。”

en:
Tom and his father are watching a car race.
There are many fast cars on the track today.
"Look at the red car! It is faster than the blue one," Tom says.
"Yes, and it is the fastest car in the race," his father says.
The driver in the red car is very good.
"Which car will win?" Tom asks.
"I think the red car will win," his father answers.
It is a very exciting race.
cn:
汤姆和爸爸在看一场赛车。
今天赛道上有许多飞快的赛车。
“看那辆红色的车！它比蓝色的那辆快，”汤姆说。
“对，而且它是这场比赛里最快的车，”爸爸说。
红色车里的驾驶员非常出色。
“哪辆车会赢呢？”汤姆问。
“我觉得红色的车会赢，”爸爸回答。
这是一场非常激动人心的比赛。
